expo.name: Kiongozi Chat
expo.description: Kenya's civic social network — connect with youth, share your voice, and chat with an AI guide on governance, civic rights, and the green economy.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone for voice input functionality.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app needs access to speech recognition to convert your voice to text.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kiongozi needs access to your photo library to share images and videos in posts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kiongozi needs access to your camera to take photos and videos for posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Kiongozi needs permission to save media to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Kiongozi needs access to your photo library to share images and videos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Kiongozi needs access to your camera to capture photos and videos.
